{{Quote|Your secret will eat at you as a Gouka Dragon gnaws through a planet's crust.|[[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]] to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Republic 59">[[Republic 59|''Republic'' 59]]</ref>}}
'''Gouka dragons''' were immense creatures that lived underground on [[Aargonar/Legends|Aargonar]]. They used high body temperatures to create tunnels of fused rock in which they lived. They preyed on [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlaccs]], but were uninterested in smaller creatures. They could be attracted by engine noise.

{{Creature-stub}}
